scripts.dev:core: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c blue,green "npm:dev" "cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.ares_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011 --reload --reload-exclude backend/history --no-access-log --log-level warning"
scripts.dev:core:lan: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c blue,green "npm:dev" "cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.ares_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8011 --reload --reload-exclude backend/history --no-access-log --log-level warning"
scripts.dev:all:full: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,WS,AGENT -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm:dev" "cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.ares_api:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011 --reload --reload-exclude backend/history --no-access-log --log-level warning" "npm:ws-bridge" "npm:agent-runner"
scripts.dev:all:full:lan: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,BACKEND,WS,AGENT -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm:dev" "cross-env ENVIRONMENT=development .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn backend.ares_api:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8011 --reload --reload-exclude backend/history --no-access-log --log-level warning" "npm:ws-bridge" "npm:agent-runner"
